programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Salvage supremo Drew Pritchard is spoiled for choice at a dealership in Henley, Oxfordshire. He meets a good match in Marlborough, Wiltshire, and tries to score a win against the house at a bingo hall

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers
programme.desc: Metal worker Ted revamps a 19th century Parisian streetlight. Plus, taxidermist Chris restores a tope shark and puts it in a beautiful display case.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team tackle a concertina that survived combat in the First World War, a vintage jigsaw, and a cocktail table with a surprising secret compartment

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The production of Chinamax, and a brand of Russian vodka

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The complex technological processes involved in creating St Petersburg Metro, Civet coffee and chip-makers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The duo relocate across the Atlantic, and Mike Brewer heads to Chicago in search of a rust-free Pontiac GTO - a rare car that he knows will be perfect for kicking off Edd China's US-based workshop

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle's 10th anniversary with Antique Archaeology becomes a surprise party for Mike - and it's a major league event with a Hollywood ending

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Mikey considers quitting the show, while OCC starts a build that will be shown to the prime minister of Malaysia, and PJD finishes a bike for baseball player Aaron Rowland

programme.title: World's Greatest Cars
programme.desc: A passion project by a few mechanics ended up creating a new kind of car - the hot hatch. A panel of motoring experts discusses the five best hot hatches of all time

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: A look at the dizzy heights of the Glacier Express, which uses updated versions of old technology to ascend the steepest slopes on its route across the Swiss Alps

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The processes involved in making steel wool, carved candles, cooking ranges and slot machines, and how technology has altered their manufacture

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The making of airline meals, paper cups and trumpets, and how technology has changed their production processes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition commences at Churchill's Hotel in Barnsley, where the guests are treated to a day out at a nearby mill and the hotel's first ever breakfast service

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Disaster strikes for smallholders in France, forcing them to diversify in an unusual direction. A couple from Oldham take on a bar renovation in Spain, while two Brits expand their glamping empire in France

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonathan and Stephen have busy lives running their own businesses, and can't wait to buy a holiday home near the glitzy town of Marbella on Spain's Costa del Sol. The couple are looking for an apartment near the beach, where they can chill out with friends while enjoying spectacular sea views on Spain's sunshine coast. With a budget of £250,000 Jean Johansson rises to the challenge, presenting the pair with five property options to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Jonnie Irwin come to the assistance of Cyndy Bevan, who cannot decide where to spend her retirement, and faces a choice between Lynton in north Devon or Aude in south-central France

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Devon couple Steven and Jennie Flowers want to buy a holiday home that can also double up as a rental investment on the western Costa del Sol in Spain. Will they be drawn towards a two-bedroom flat near fashionable Estepona or will they be won over by a frontline beach house a little further west?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Riding-school owner Michelle hosts the first dinner party on the Isle of Man, where she plans to impress her guests with a country-themed menu of garden shot game pie and rhubarb sponge. As her raucous evening gets under way, it remains to be seen whether it will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize by the end of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired gardener Eva hosts the second night on the Isle of Man, where she hopes to keep herself the centre of attention for her dinner party, and thinks that by pulling out all the stops her evening will scoop the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Account manager Justine hosts the third night on the Isle of Man, and hopes to be able to woo her guests with a love-themed evening. Everything seems to be going to plan when local entrepreneur Stuart decides to get on one knee and propose to eccentric Londoner Eva with a napkin ring holder, and horse-riding instructor Michelle announces that she bought her partner an Aston Martin for his birthday

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bike enthusiast Richard hosts the fourth night of the competition on the Isle of Man, and hopes his motorbike racing-themed night can take him to the top of the leaderboard. Entrepreneur Stuart boasts about his extreme lifestyle, while the host attempts to woo his guests by bringing out his pet rabbit - but account manager Justine is less than impressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the turn of the former Apprentice contestant and entrepreneur Stuart Baggs to host the final dinner party on the Isle of Man. He serves an American-inspired mezze with steak and chips, and an aptly-titled 'Harvard mess' for dessert, although finds himself rather out of his depth in the kitchen. At the dining table the conversation turns to how the host used to be a little on the larger side, and Eva's endearing nickname for her fellow contestant Richard is revealed

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps a couple from Kent find a home on Spain's Orihuela Costa on a budget of £100,000, with a golf course within easy reach

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas offers advice to Karen and Paul from Dundee, who are looking for a holiday home on Spain's stunning Mijas Costa where they can enjoy family getaways with their teenage son Nicholas. They would love to find an apartment with lots of outside space

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two couples searching in the Scottish capital. Zoe and Jason are returning to their native Edinburgh after a decade living and working in Hong Kong. They have £950,000 but that will only buy them a flat around their preferred area. Can Phil fulfil their expensive wishlist? Kirstie is with Tan, from Lisbon, and his Fife-born wife Stephanie, who cannot agree on a countryside feel or city vibe

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Lonesome teenager Jasmine seeks a canine companion to replace her twin sister Shola, who's leaving her to start a university course. Her family thinks that pedigree beagle Zoe will make the perfect new sibling, but Jasmine isn't so sure. Elsewhere, staff of Wood Green animal charity believe Jim the poodle could prove the perfect match for 12-year-old Lexi, who is looking for a 'bedtime buddy'

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on recently aired shows, including watching Game of Talents, Line of Duty, Catfish UK: The TV Show, Four in a Bed, Paranormal Activity and Cher & the Loneliest Elephant. Plus, they share their observations of the coverage of the funeral of HRH the Duke of Edinburgh and Good Morning Britain's report of an altercation between Labour leader Keir Starmer and a pub landlord

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles
programme.desc: Documentary following patients and staff at one of the UK's leading fetal medicine units. This episode follows three expectant mothers navigating complex pregnancies. Becky's unborn baby has a rare lung tumour that is growing rapidly, Ann-Marie is carrying identical twins, one of which has selective growth restriction jeopardising both baby's chances of surviving, and Randika's dwarfism makes giving birth a difficult proposition

programme.title: VE Day in Colour: Britain's Biggest Party
programme.desc: Using newly recorded accounts and previously unseen archive, this is the story of the day in May 1945 when the fighting finally stopped across Europe and the celebrations began as Britain rejoiced in unity. The stories of ordinary folk are heard, but alongside the happy tales of street parties, fancy dress, and jelly and ice cream are the reflections of those thinking of loved ones who wouldn't return to enjoy a peace that was hard won

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: More of the most memorable moments from the past five years, including one of the zoo's most enduring love stories at Penguin Island. At 22, Rudd is the oldest penguin on the island and has been with his partner Spike for more than 15 years. Meanwhile, Silvery gibbon Alvin is keen to get close to his partner Tilu again, but ever since they had a baby together, young Eko has proven a bit of a passion killer

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Comedian James Acaster, actor Russell Tovey, TV presenter Rylan Clark-Neal and actress Michelle Keegan face three baking tasks set by judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood, starting with topped flapjacks for the signature challenge and a tricky technical. They are then asked to create their 'happy places' out of meringue for the showstopper challenge. Who will flap at the first hurdle and who will battle their way through to be crowned star baker? Presented by Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding

programme.title: How to Save a Grand in 24 Hours
programme.desc: Anna Richardson and a team of cost-cutting experts offer viewers tips on saving money and sorting out their homes, beginning by helping a London family of six with their bills. Chef Gary Usher, DIY expert Eve Humphreys and cleaning wonder Peachy Clean find ways to cut their food bills and excessive shopping sprees and dish out some cleaning tips

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Vets Emily and Will need to relocate two cheetahs to spread blood lines. Volunteer Debbie is put to the test as nine orphaned baby monkeys arrive at Riverside Rehabilitation Centre

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at Darnells' Farm Luxury Glamping in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where arachnophobe Snehal checks every corner of his lodging for unwanted eight-legged guests

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: As the summer nears its end, two Brits who own a French campsite find out if they've made enough to keep their dream alive. There are teething problems for a couple who run a bar in Spain. Plus, a couple from Yorkshire tempt French locals with their new Thai takeaway business

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: James first visited Crete over 40 years ago and has always longed to buy a holiday home there. Now that his partner Alison has also fallen in love with the Greek island too, they've both decided to turn their dream into a reality. Ben Hillman helps the couple find a suitable holiday home - ideally a traditional village house - on their budget of £80,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Heather and Nigel Holmes fancy a brand-new life in a modern property with amazing views in the Mijas area of Spain. However, as Heather's mum is in a home in Hampshire, they would also like a smaller base near to her for when they visit the UK. Jasmine Harman and Jonnie Irwin help them find the best of both

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Deborah Sims has long dreamt of relocating permanently to southern Spain. With a budget of £90,000, she is looking for a property in the Manilva region, with an easy commute to Gibraltar. It's a big lifestyle change to make on her own, so it's important that presenter Sara Demergi finds the ideal property that can help start the next chapter of Deborah's life

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hunting enthusiast Hunni Hindley hosts the first party in Lincoln, basing it on a murder-mystery theme and concocting an unconventional menu in the hope of landing the £1,000 prize. There is a heated debate on hunting, and the other guests provide interesting discourse including Ricky Summers-Calvert, who has a revelation to make about his acting career

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Medical supplier Caroline Bevis hosts the second dinner party in Lincoln, hoping her Roaring Twenties-themed evening, including black-bottom Betty torte with beetroot ice-cream, will secure her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Insurance underwriter Glenn Priestly hosts the third dinner party from Lincoln, and hopes his theme of rock music legends will win over his guests. However, the tone of the evening is lowered by student Richard Summers-Calvert's inappropriate questions

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bodybuilding drama student Richard Summers-Calvert hosts the fourth party of the week from Lincoln. He serves chicken and rice for his starter, main and dessert, but with a few twists, and entertains his guests with a game of charades after asking them to dress up as action heroes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: All-American mother and former barrister Natashka Ingham hosts the final dinner party from Lincolnshire, and hopes to impress her guests with a theme of The Great American Dream. Her dishes include 'fall off your horse black bottom pie' and 'cow tail pie' and, despite the fact conversation turns to underpants and toilets, she hopes to have done enough to win the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debbie and Dave from West Sussex fancy owning a holiday home in the Dordogne region of France, so Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties within their £200,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is house-hunting in the foothills of the Sierra Nevada mountain range with keen adventurer Mark, who wants to relocate to the Spanish countryside

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps a couple from Kent find a home on Spain's Orihuela Costa on a budget of £100,000, with a golf course within easy reach

programme.title: How to Save a Grand in 24 Hours
programme.desc: Anna Richardson and a team of cost-cutting experts offer viewers tips on saving money and sorting out their homes, beginning by helping a London family of six with their bills. Chef Gary Usher, DIY expert Eve Humphreys and cleaning wonder Peachy Clean find ways to cut their food bills and excessive shopping sprees and dish out some cleaning tips

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the rising incidence of theft in Northamptonshire, where in 2018 burglaries hit a five-year high. PC Imogen Robinson chases a prolific shoplifter who has stolen a box of chocolate bars from a shop. PC Ben Norris is dispatched to apprehend a suspected burglar who then carries out a rooftop protest

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: Documentary following West Midlands Ambulance Service at the peak of the Covid-19 pandemic in April 2020, from the perspective of the crews, control room staff and managers as they deal with the human cost of the biggest ever challenge to the service. To get more ambulances onto the frontline, managers deploy student paramedics, with 21-year-old Sam and 20-year-old Caitlyn encountering patients with breathing difficulties, in care homes, and with mental health issues that appear isolation-related

programme.title: Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles
programme.desc: Documentary following patients and staff at one of the UK's leading fetal medicine units. This episode follows three expectant mothers navigating complex pregnancies. Becky's unborn baby has a rare lung tumour that is growing rapidly, Ann-Marie is carrying identical twins, one of which has selective growth restriction jeopardising both baby's chances of surviving, and Randika's dwarfism makes giving birth a difficult proposition

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix sets two fine dining chefs the challenge of creating a perfect replica of the Snickers bar. The combination of chocolate, peanuts, caramel and nougat may sound simple, but it proves to be a marathon challenge for Tom Brown, who has his own restaurant in London's trendy Hackney Wick, and Sabrina Gidda, who runs the kitchen at the all-female members' club AllBright in Mayfair. After weeks of trials and tribulations, the rivals cook their replicas from scratch for the factory bigwigs, who will choose the winner

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Comedian Harry Hill, actor-presenter-musician Martin Kemp, comedian and actress Roisin Conaty and broadcaster Bill Turnbull take part in the charity contest. Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding guide them through the assorted challenges, and Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith pass judgment on their baking skills

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two couples searching in the Scottish capital. Zoe and Jason are returning to their native Edinburgh after a decade living and working in Hong Kong. They have £950,000 but that will only buy them a flat around their preferred area. Can Phil fulfil their expensive wishlist? Kirstie is with Tan, from Lisbon, and his Fife-born wife Stephanie, who cannot agree on a countryside feel or city vibe

programme.title: Second Hand for 50 Grand
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a company that tracks down luxury second-hand items, going the extra mile to hunt down the exact handbags, watches and jewellery on their clients' wish-lists and find out the personal stories behind them. Window cleaner Grant's dad wants to buy him a Cartier watch as a thank you for looking after him. Rebecca asks head of handbags Reece to scour the globe for an exact match to a stolen Prada bag gifted by her late mother. Meanwhile, firefighter Hywell has received a watch from his Grandad. If the team can prove that it's genuine, then Hywell's life is about to change for ever

programme.title: Trip Hazard: My Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Rosie Jones takes fellow comedian and broadcaster Jamali Maddix to the East Anglian city of Norwich. The pair learn an 18th-century folk dance from a bunch of local men who are keeping the tradition of molly dancing alive, tour the city's epic cathedral and watch tiny trains go round and round at the UK's largest indoor model attraction. The duo also taste a variety of wines at a nearby vineyard and sober up in time to attend a blacksmithing course, during which they heat and hammer metal under the guidance of a local artisan. Narrated by Olivia Colman

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners stay the night at Hatton Court Hotel in Gloucester, a country style establishment that at first proves a hit - until cleanliness concerns, sleepless nights and missing breakfast items leave them disappointed

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Road Trip
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix explores Mallorca's coast in a sailing boat, and meets a family who are attempting to launch a restaurant on the north of the island

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps a couple from Kent find a home on Spain's Orihuela Costa on a budget of £100,000, with a golf course within easy reach

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Grant and Francesca Crofton have a two-year-old son and would like to expand their family further. This means they need more space, but should this be in Leeds - where they live now - or Treviso in Italy, where Francesca comes from? Laura Hamilton and Jonnie Irwin help the couple weigh up their options

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: For 10 years, publicans Chris and Sue from Shropshire have fancied owning their dream holiday home, and now they go in search for it on Portugal's stunning Silver Coast, with £100,000 to invest

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-mad executive PA Julie-Ann Rayner hosts the first dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and hopes to impress her guests - science teacher Damian Loneragan, DJ Scott Langley, barmaid Steph Barrett and glamorous granny Carol Dolman - with a 'taste of the sea' menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carol Dolman hosts the second dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex. The glamorous grandmother hopes her scallops and roast lamb, 'dress to impress' theme and tango lessons given by local instructors are enough to win her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Damian Loneragan hosts the third dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, where he hopes his chilli-based dishes, and a lemon and ginger dessert, will help him win the £1,000 prize. However, after a disastrous main course, he goes all-out to wow his guests with science experiments in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Steph Barrett is the fourth host of this week's competition in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and sets a 1940s dress code. The day gets off to a tricky start when she attempts to make home-made pastry for the first time, but her nan saves the day. The guests are suitably impressed by her home, and the dancing entertainment goes down even better than the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Scott Langley hosts the final party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and decides to take a gamble by serving fried pigeon as his main course. He insists on an 'outrageous' dress code for the evening, and unveils some special entertainment before the week's winner is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Lancashire couple Derek and Jane find a dream home in Chiclana de la Frontera, Spain, showing them five properties to accommodate all their grown-up children

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonathan and Stephen have busy lives running their own businesses, and can't wait to buy a holiday home near the glitzy town of Marbella on Spain's Costa del Sol. The couple are looking for an apartment near the beach, where they can chill out with friends while enjoying spectacular sea views on Spain's sunshine coast. With a budget of £250,000 Jean Johansson rises to the challenge, presenting the pair with five property options to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debbie and Dave from West Sussex fancy owning a holiday home in the Dordogne region of France, so Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties within their £200,000 budget

programme.title: The Great British Spitfire Restoration
programme.desc: Documentary following a team of engineers as they work to restore a 1943 Spitfire to its former glory. Led by a factory owner and operating out of a little-known workshop on one of Britain's most important wartime airbases, the dedicated enthusiasts spend a year getting the iconic aircraft into condition to take to the skies once again. Narrated by Al Murray

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes (2017)
programme.desc: A devastating conflict erupts between humans and intelligent primates in a post-apocalyptic future. The leader of the apes is determined to make peace and prove his people are not savages - but a tragic course of events leaves him wrestling with a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, the conclusion of the trilogy of prequels to the 1968 movie. Starring Andy Serkis, Woody Harrelson and Steve Zahn

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson meets 21-year-old YouTuber Jay from London, who has no problem messaging women online but cannot make connections in real life, and 28-year-old Victoria from Liverpool, who is looking for her very own Xena, Warrior Princess. Will the back-to-basics approach of Naked Attraction help either of them find what they're looking for?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show with a difference, in which another two singletons take their pick of potential partners based purely on their naked bodies. First up is 27-year-old Kelly, a carer from Brighton. She's unsure whether she's looking for a man or a woman but hopes to find her the perfect partner to give her a little TLC. She is followed by 29-year-old steeplejack Carlo from Somerset, who is looking for woman that he can sweep off her feet

programme.title: Guy Martin's Battle of Britain
programme.desc: Part two of two. Guy's training ramps up at the UK's only aerial combat school, where he must master dogfighting at 200mph, handling extreme g-force, and flying upside down. He enlists the help of the Parachute Regiment for a unique experiment demonstrating the firepower of Second World War aircraft machine guns, before being allowed behind the joystick of the world's only two-seater Hawker Hurricane to face a Messerschmitt 109 in the skies over Kent

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Self-made millionaire Delia is looking for a man to build a future with - could City trader Mark be the one? Bengy has a trauma from his past he is reluctant to share - luckily Lara is a caring soul with a listening ear. butcher Nick is excited at the thought of meeting someone, even though he admits he doesn't know how to speak to women

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Architecture student Priti has trouble finding a man in the academic world and wants someone older, rugged and tattooed. No stranger to the tattooist's chair is Australian entrepreneur Nick - but will the age gap end up being a problem for these two singletons? Firefighter Katie and her date - also called Katie - open up about significant turning points in their lives, while superhero fanatic Richard thinks he has hit the jackpot when his date turns out to be a self-confessed geek and Comic Con fan

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Jacob is the 19-year-old student son of millionaires, whose Chelsea flat was a gift from his parents. He goes to live with a cash-strapped couple in Manchester and their three children, and discovers that their weekly food budget matches one of his restaurant meals

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Updates on the story of property developer Jon Morgan, who called in an eviction specialist when the disused tram station he bought as an investment was taken over by squatters. Plus, a couple who rented out their home while they moved to America - only for their tenant to end up owing them £10,000 in back payments - and how a team from Peterborough Council came across a house with life-threatening electrics and some of the worst damp and mould they had ever seen

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: People featured in previous episodes, including an Essex landlady who wondered why her tenant had stopped paying rent - only to discover that the woman was in prison for GBH and that her ex-boyfriend had moved into the flat. Plus, a music entrepreneur who took his tenant to court after receiving no rent for seven months

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers are kept busy with public order patrols as World Cup fever hits Essex, and an ambitious thief tries to steal a 200-gallon fuel tank. In a hunt for stolen vehicles, the Air Support Unit is forced to shut the Dartford Crossing, and a suspected drug dealer cannot give a reasonable explanation for a suspicious nosebleed

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers try to track down the criminals responsible for robbing a supermarket. Elsewhere, an interceptor is unconvinced when a disqualified driver pretends to be someone else, and a rude biker is taken to task

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police helicopter team pursues an armed robber trying to evade arrest, and new recruits put their detective skills to the test by apprehending suspected burglars. PC Russ Gay tries to calm down a group of unruly drunken youths and Zippy the sniffer dog makes an interesting discovery inside a stolen car

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmore are met with lies and aggression when they track down nearly £3,000 owed by a garage mechanic, while Steve and Ben encounter a retired couple who are being forced to leave their home. Stuart and Vic revisit a young debtor who owe £750 for a laptop computer, and in Oxfordshire, Paul and Steve chase £30,000 owed by a world-famous Formula One racing team

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Dipi appoints Nicolette as manager, Roxy wants Shane's Waterhole send-off to be unforgettable, and Jane returns to find a loved-up Chloe and Nicolette

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin and Leah seek out Susie after realising there are problems with their home loan. Tane and Nikau visit Ari in the hospital

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Millionaire property developer Immanuel Ezekiel and his adult children, who reside in a penthouse in an exclusive area of London, swap homes, lives and budgets with single mum Amy Impey and her two kids, who live on the breadline in a council property in Boreham Wood. While the former thinks nothing of spending half the year travelling, the latter cannot even afford a day out in London. How will the privileged Ezekiels manage with a very limited budget, and will a week in property inspire Amy on to bigger and better things?

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall takes on a 12-stone Great Dane that insists on sleeping in its owner's bed and a French bulldog that will not let anyone leave the house. Finally, Graeme takes a look at the art of toilet training, discussing the importance of patience as he deals with a 14-week-old puppy who has yet to master this important skill

programme.title: Beatrice and Eugenie: Pampered Princesses?
programme.desc: A profile of the sisters who have been vilified, mocked, satirised and trolled for their clothes, looks, privilege and holidays, but probably most of all for simply being the children of the Duke and Duchess of York. The documentary looks at how close to reality public perception of the princesses actually is, with archive footage and interviews with royal insiders and people who know them

programme.title: Zara and Anne: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Documentary examining the relationship between Princess Anne and her daughter, using archive footage and interviews with historians, royal correspondents and insiders to reveal how Zara Tindall has been brought up to follow in her mother's footsteps. The programme looks at what makes them the royal family's unique mother and daughter duo, an if Zara ever escape her mother's firm grip

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at some of the most terrifying disasters in recent history, from horrifying dramas at sea to one of the worst air disasters in British aviation history, using eye witness testimony and footage taken by those involved telling the human stories behind the events. A cruise ship sailing off the coast of Norway is caught in a dangerous storm, and a passenger witnesses the casing of an airplane engine being ripped off mid-flight

programme.title: Dirty John
programme.desc: Debra discovers John's criminal record, but even hard evidence about his past of abuse, stalking and scamming is not enough to convince her of his true intentions

programme.title: 22 Kids & Counting
programme.desc: With 10 teenagers now living in the Radford house, their laziness is driving mum Sue to take up DIY projects, leaving the house in chaos as they drag on. Sue wants a third French bulldog and while Noel says that isn't going to happen, she gets her own way, and there is another addition to the family, albeit just a new puppy

programme.title: Cats and Dogs at War
programme.desc: Documentary following families with warring pets, including terrier-cross pup Teddy who is tormenting his feline housemates Ernie and Molly

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul has a tenant in Lancashire who is behind with his rent and won't return any calls, but the situation is much worse than he could possibly have imagined when he heads into the upstairs bedroom. Harrow enforcement officers Andrew and Ozge are called to a local salon, where a leak from the upstairs flat is disrupting Masi's ability to run her shop. Once the landlord agrees to give them access, they discover terrible conditions and a back yard piled with rubbish

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Essex unit pulls over an angry driver and a car thief leads officers on a cross-country chase. The air support team pursues an athletic burglar and a vehicle with a burst tyre, while other interceptors search for a lost key and are forced to arrest a colleague

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers in South Yorkshire's Road Crime Unit, which is based in Sheffield, pursue a drunken driver and join forces with the helicopter to track down a wanted criminal on a motorcycle. Meanwhile, a new driver crashes into an unmarked police car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drug dealer who has been driving dangerously reveals a surprising amount of information when he is pulled over, and friends try to baffle the pursuit team by changing their names. Meanwhile, an officer has a shock in store for a law-breaking driver

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned suggests moving in with Yashvi, but does not get the reaction he hoped for, and Nicolette tells Clive to ask Jane to stay with him

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean feels the pressure as Jai gets excited for his dad to win the Summer Bay Classic surf competition. Justin and Leah suspect Susie is up to no good

programme.title: M&S vs Waitrose: Which Is Better Value?
programme.desc: Documentary examining the ongoing rivalry between the supermarkets. Marks & Spencer has always had a special place in the nation's heart, with almost 1,000 stores and a reputation for quality stretching back 135 years. But Waitrose has proved a fierce rival. However, both stores face tough challenges in the future, not least from online retailers. Which of the two is best equipped to weather the high-street storm?

programme.title: Million Pound Homes
programme.desc: A look at the country's most impressive motorhomes, beginning with Charlotte and David's. They share a passion for travel and now are having their own overlander built, an off-road motorhome that can deal with any terrain. Plus, a look at The Icon, built by Formula One champion Jacques Villeneuve, which rents out for £4,000 a night

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A man who fell through a window has a phobia of needles, which leads him to refuse any kind of pain relief and even attempt to discharge himself before his injuries are treated. An aggressive patient is brought in by four police officers after smashing up his mother's home, and has to undergo a toxicology test. Dr Audrey Fox tries to save the life of a patient who has overdosed, and a woman suffers a head injury after slipping on a slice of pizza her husband had left on the floor for their dog to eat

programme.title: Road House (1989)
programme.desc: A philosophy-reading kung fu expert gains a reputation as the best bouncer around, and is hired by the owner of a rowdy Missouri bar to keep the peace. When he fires some of the establishment's corrupt staff, he incurs the wrath of a local crime boss who has a stranglehold on the town's businesses. Action thriller, starring Patrick Swayze, Ben Gazzara, Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and blues singer Jeff Healey

The house is in terrible shape, but the young tenants promise they will clear it all up and keep the noise down. Instead, however, the partying gets worse, with some of the tenants' 'associates' making nasty threats

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul is called to a houseshare after fighting, cannabis use and partying drive one resident out of the property establishes the source of the problem is a young couple. Harrow housing agents Andrew and Jo find a suspected unlicensed multiple-occupancy house in gross disrepair. After tracking down the landlord, they have mercy and allow him to spend his £5,000 fine on fixing up the property, in the hope he will turn it into a nice family home. But will the he be as good as his word?

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: An officer is nearly run over by a desperate driver, and another's patience is tested by a drunken motorist. Plus, a law enforcer goes in search of a suspicious character, and a group of youths tries to deceive the interception unit

programme.desc: A helicopter is used in the pursuit of an armed robber, ending in a serious accident. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: A current area for growth is vegan food, so Iceland's vegan buyer visits a factory to watch meatless sausage rolls being produced, as well as scoping out vegan products for the future. The Iceland team also tucks into its rivals' choc ices, while out in Italy the team develops a new ice-cream cake. Elsewhere, some environmentally friendly packaging for fruit and vegetables is put to the test with a view to making the company plastic free by 2023

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow folks whose clever ideas and savvy schemes save them a small fortune

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan come to the aid of a compulsive buyer in Morecambe whose semi-detached bungalow has become overrun with junk, dust and grime

programme.title: The Woman with 40 Cats
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into the lives of people whose love of animals has become an obsession. Retired secretary Marlene has 40 cats, which are groomed and bathed every day, while Deb and her family share their home with a brood of chickens. Matt keeps a huge collection of snakes, lizards and other reptiles, and he must also breed thousands of insects and worms to keep the creatures fed

programme.title: Gypsy Kids: Our Secret World
programme.desc: Childhood in gypsy and traveller communities. Eight-year-old Ellie-May has been teased at school for being a gypsy. Now, armed with her fake tan and sequinned dresses, she is hoping to shine as she takes on her rivals in a beauty contest. Fifteen-year-old David works on his haggling skills, while young Nicole dreams of stepping away from her domestic duties to sing in a talent show, organised by her grandad Paddy Doherty, of Celebrity Big Brother fame

programme.title: Good Will Hunting (1997)
programme.desc: A troubled maths genius refuses to use his gift, preferring to work as a janitor and lead a normal life with his friends. Eventually, a university professor persuades him to see a psychologist, who befriends him and proves the only person able to help him come to terms with his talent and past traumas. Drama, written by and starring Matt Damon and Ben Affleck, who won Oscars for their screenplay. With Robin Williams, Minnie Driver and Stellan Skarsgard

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance welcomes NCIS Special Agent Jacqueline 'Jack' Sloane to headquarters. The NCIS team investigates the kidnapping of a sailor, which sends Torres and Bishop out to sea to track evidence. Mark Harmon, Maria Bello and Rocky Carroll star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: One of Reeves' friends is kidnapped, and when the agents investigate, they discover their suspect is a man who disappeared two days earlier - with confidential military information

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gang leader is stabbed to death in a prison scuffle, and Briscoe and Green uncover a number of suspects as it becomes clear the victim had numerous enemies on both sides of the law. The investigation results in a charge, but McCoy faces an uphill battle to convict the accused. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a clothes shop owner during an apparent robbery. An open lock suggests someone who works there was responsible, and the trail eventually leads to the son of the dead man's business partner, whose shady dealings were at risk of being exposed. However, the suspect flees to Israel before police have a chance to question him

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A student is found stabbed to death in his flat, and a college friend is soon named prime suspect - but she claims the victim was a stranger who used a date rape drug on her. However, it soon emerges that the crime could have been racially motivated. Drama, with Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the suspicious death of a reality TV contestant. They discover the show's producers had been provoking bad feeling toward the dead man among his fellow participants, while a cameraman reveals that his last moments were captured on film. However, the incriminating tape cannot be found. Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have difficulty pinning the death of a strangled woman on their prime suspect, drug dealer Francis 'Taz' Partell. However, while questioning one of his former associates, they discover new evidence indicating he was responsible for another murder in the Bronx

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of Richard Speigel, chief financial officer for an exclusive, family owned department store, results in the arrests of the shop staff - but the manager and father refuses to let his offspring take the blame, and goes all out to get them off the hook. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is found murdered on a golf course, and when it emerges his amateur radio habit might be the key to catching the killer, McGee gets a chance to revisit his favourite childhood hobby bt spending hours on the victim's ham radio. Palmer asks his co-workers to donate to a charity

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Convicted felon Gabriel Hicks swears he was framed for murder a decade ago, so Gibbs begins his own investigation starting with a new autopsy by Ducky. They quickly determine two serious issues with the original findings - the killer was left-handed while Hicks is right-handed, and there was a mysterious witness who was never found. Meanwhile, FBI Agent Fornell joins the unit

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An NCIS 'person of interest' in a bribery and fraud case is found murdered after a jogger is led to his body by a strange, unidentified voice. Meanwhile, McGee and Delilah disagree on whether to determine the baby's sex

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee reluctantly visits his high school after the unique computer password he used as a teenager is linked to the murder of a Department of Defense contractor. The case escalates when an intruder breaks into McGee's home in an attempt to steal his archaic high school computer

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and his new temporary partner Bishop are assigned to investigate the death of a reporter whose lover is the prime suspect in her murder. They discover the victim may have been involved with her editor - and could also have been helping plagiarise and invent stories for the paper. Vincent D'Onofrio and Samantha Buck star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Bishop try to track down a latter-day Bonnie and Clyde who have already killed nine people, including two undercover cops. There is little evidence to go on, except that the officers were looking into an illegal gun-running ring. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Samantha Buck

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A celebrity reveals himself as the victim of a predator targeting men in gay clubs, but as the team investigates the case, a huge twist emerges in his tale

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate two murders and discover that the Wesen Council has sent a bounty hunter to Portland to have Nick killed. Henrietta gives Juliette some bad news. prompting her to ask a friend of her mother's to reverse her transformation. Renard meets with Viktor and Adalind

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: In solving the murders of two teenagers killed in a burning building, Nick is forced into an uneasy alliance with the Wesen who murdered Monroe's friend to crack the case of a serial arsonist with the power to generate intense heat. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick (and Hank investigate a murder victim with his foot cut off, and stumble onto a disturbing Wesen take on the 'lucky rabbit's foot'. In an effort to help, Monroe and Rosalee go undercover. Meanwhile, the fallout from Adalind and Juliette's showdown still has Nick reeling and sends him on a path that leads to Henrietta

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Van Buren orders Briscoe and Green to reinvestigate unsolved cases, starting with the murder of a teenager 20 years previously. However, they discover much of the evidence gathered at the time has vanished, and the detective in charge of the case may have pursued an innocent man to protect the real culprit. An unexpected confession allows the case to end up in court again, but legal trickery makes a conviction an unlikely prospect

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man with a history of violence is arrested for the murder of his son's school ice-hockey coach, but pleads mitigating circumstances. Helped by a glib defence lawyer, he claims that he committed the crime while suffering from a previously unknown mental condition he calls 'sports rage'

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a rare coin dealer, focusing their efforts on a millionaire who seems the most likely culprit - but Ross finds himself forced to play detective too. Sam Waterson and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of Karen Hall, a staff member in the State Attorney General's Office, whose body has been found in the Hudson River - and her boss Frank Conroy quickly becomes a suspect. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a couple found dead in their apartment, following a trail of drugs and money to the wife of an army officer responsible for anti-narcotics operations in Colombia. Despite the woman's reluctance to co-operate with the police, McCoy convinces her she has no choice but to risk her life in a bid to catch the murderer. Charlotte d'Amboise guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The case against a man accused of shooting the leader of the African-American Congress is jeopardised by the revelation that the prosecution's chief witness was once an informant for the FBI, and is still under their protection

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Thanksgiving arrives, but the NCIS agents' plans to celebrate are put on hold when they are tasked with tracking an elusive international arms dealer at large in DC who recently murdered an MI6 officer. Meanwhile, Abby races Delilah to the hospital when her labour starts three weeks early

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres and Sloane run protection detail for a US Senator Phillips in Afghanistan, but are summoned home to the States after a near-fatal altercation leaves the politician's son in a critical condition

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The unit begins a sting operation to bring down a drug-running syndicate based at a Norfolk civilian marina. Torres and Bishop go undercover as a criminal couple available for hire as part of the mission

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the mysterious drowning of a neurologist who was due to appear in court as an expert witness in a euthanasia case. programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The patriarch of a wealthy family is beaten to death with a hockey stick, and there are a number of possible suspects. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

Renard has a disturbing, recurring dream about getting shot, and wakes to find himself soaked in blood. programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: Sparks and Embers (2015)
programme.desc: A French woman living in London ends her relationship with her boyfriend when she decides to return to her own country. On the day she is due to leave, they meet again for one last goodbye. Despite knowing their break-up is for the best, both find themselves tempted to stay together - but neither feels brave enough to say it. Romantic comedy, starring Kris Marshall and Annelise Hesme

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Eagle Rock (1964)
